title: My Favorite Food
text: My name is Omar. My favorite food is pizza.
I like pizza because it is delicious and easy to eat.
I usually eat pizza with my friends on weekends.
Sometimes, I eat pizza at home while watching TV.

questions.question: Why does Omar like pizza?
options: Because it is delicious and easy to eat
questions.correctAnswer: Because it is delicious and easy to eat

questions.question: When does Omar usually eat pizza?
What does Omar do while eating pizza at home?
